untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires visual/geometric analysis: (1) Ascending Broadening Wedge shape with dual trend lines and slope comparison cannot be expressed with allowed indicators; (2) 'Both trend lines slope higher' and 'Upper trend line steeper than lower' require trend line calculation and comparison; (3) 'Megaphone-shaped pattern' and 'Broadening appearance' need pattern recognition beyond point-in-time indicators; (4) 'Prices pierce lower trend line' requires trend line detection not available in indicator list. Translated entry as gap-down breakout with volume surge as proxy for the described mechanic, but this is incomplete without trend line detection capability.
translation_notes: Pattern requires architectural support for trend line detection and slope comparison. Current translation approximates the downside breakout signal (close below pivot on elevated volume) but cannot validate the full Ascending Broadening Wedge geometry.
